69            params["page_size"] = page_size
70        if ordering is not None:
71            params["ordering"] = f"-{ordering}" if descending else ordering
72        return cast(
73            PagedResult[DocumentType],
74            await self._core._list_resource("document_types", DocumentType, params or None),
75        )

Return document types defined in paperless-ngx.

When page is None (the default), all pages are fetched automatically and next / previous in the result are always None. When page is set, only that page is fetched and next / previous reflect the raw API values.

Arguments:
  • ids: Return only document types whose ID is in this list.
  • name_contains: Case-insensitive substring filter on name.
  • name_exact: Case-insensitive exact match on name.
  • page: Return only this specific page (1-based).
  • page_size: Number of results per page.
  • ordering: Field to sort by.
  • descending: When True, reverses the sort direction.
Returns:

~easypaperless.models.paged_result.PagedResult of ~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType objects.

async def get(self, id: int) -> easypaperless.DocumentType: 
77    async def get(self, id: int) -> DocumentType:
78        """Fetch a single document type by its ID.
79
80        Args:
81            id: Numeric document-type ID.
82
83        Returns:
84            The :class:`~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType` with the given ID.
85
86        Raises:
87            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document type exists with that ID.
88        """
89        logger.info("Getting document type id=%d", id)
90        return cast(
91            DocumentType, await self._core._get_resource("document_types", id, DocumentType)
92        )

Fetch a single document type by its ID.

Arguments:
  • id: Numeric document-type ID.
Returns:

The ~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType with the given ID.

Raises:
  • ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document type exists with that ID.
async def create( self, *, name: str, match: str | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, matching_algorithm: easypaperless.MatchingAlgorithm | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, is_insensitive: bool = True, owner: int | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, set_permissions: easypaperless.SetPermissions | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET) -> easypaperless.DocumentType: 
 94    async def create(
 95        self,
 96        *,
 97        name: str,
 98        match: str | Unset = UNSET,
 99        matching_algorithm: MatchingAlgorithm | Unset = UNSET,
100        is_insensitive: bool = True,
101        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
102        set_permissions: SetPermissions | None | Unset = UNSET,
103    ) -> DocumentType:
104        """Create a new document type.
105
106        Args:
107            name: Document-type name. Must be unique.
108            match: Auto-matching pattern.
109            matching_algorithm: Controls how ``match`` is applied.
110                E.g. ``matching_algorithm=MatchingAlgorithm.REGEX`` for
111                regular-expression matching.
112            is_insensitive: When ``True``, ``match`` is case-insensitive.
113                Defaults to ``True``, matching the paperless-ngx API default.
114            owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner.
115            set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets.
116                Pass ``None`` to create with empty permissions.
117
118        Returns:
119            The newly created :class:`~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType`.
120        """
121        logger.info("Creating document type name=%r", name)
122        return cast(
123            DocumentType,
124            await self._core._create_resource(
125                "document_types",
126                DocumentType,
127                owner=owner,
128                set_permissions=set_permissions,
129                name=name,
130                match=match,
131                matching_algorithm=matching_algorithm,
132                is_insensitive=is_insensitive,
133            ),
134        )

Create a new document type.

Arguments:
  • name: Document-type name. Must be unique.
  • match: Auto-matching pattern.
  • matching_algorithm: Controls how match is applied. E.g. matching_algorithm=MatchingAlgorithm.REGEX for regular-expression matching.
  • is_insensitive: When True, match is case-insensitive. Defaults to True, matching the paperless-ngx API default.
  • owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner.
  • set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets. Pass None to create with empty permissions.
Returns:

The newly created ~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType.

async def update( self, id: int, *, name: str | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, match: str | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, matching_algorithm: easypaperless.MatchingAlgorithm | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, is_insensitive: bool | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, owner: int | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, set_permissions: easypaperless.SetPermissions | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET) -> easypaperless.DocumentType: 
136    async def update(
137        self,
138        id: int,
139        *,
140        name: str | Unset = UNSET,
141        match: str | Unset = UNSET,
142        matching_algorithm: MatchingAlgorithm | Unset = UNSET,
143        is_insensitive: bool | Unset = UNSET,
144        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
145        set_permissions: SetPermissions | None | Unset = UNSET,
146    ) -> DocumentType:
147        """Partially update a document type (PATCH semantics).
148
149        Args:
150            id: Numeric ID of the document type to update.
151            name: Document-type name.
152            match: Auto-matching pattern.
153            matching_algorithm: Controls how ``match`` is applied.
154                E.g. ``matching_algorithm=MatchingAlgorithm.REGEX`` for
155                regular-expression matching.
156            is_insensitive: When ``True``, ``match`` is case-insensitive.
157            owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner.
158                Pass ``None`` to clear the owner.
159                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
160            set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets.
161                Pass ``None`` to clear all permissions (overwrite with empty).
162                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
163
164        Returns:
165            The updated :class:`~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType`.
166        """
167        logger.info("Updating document type id=%d", id)
168        return cast(
169            DocumentType,
170            await self._core._update_resource(
171                "document_types",
172                id,
173                DocumentType,
174                name=name,
175                match=match,
176                matching_algorithm=matching_algorithm,
177                is_insensitive=is_insensitive,
178                owner=owner,
179                set_permissions=set_permissions,
180            ),
181        )

Partially update a document type (PATCH semantics).

Arguments:
  • id: Numeric ID of the document type to update.
  • name: Document-type name.
  • match: Auto-matching pattern.
  • matching_algorithm: Controls how match is applied. E.g. matching_algorithm=MatchingAlgorithm.REGEX for regular-expression matching.
  • is_insensitive: When True, match is case-insensitive.
  • owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner. Pass None to clear the owner. Omit (or pass ~easypaperless.UNSET) to leave unchanged.
  • set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets. Pass None to clear all permissions (overwrite with empty). Omit (or pass ~easypaperless.UNSET) to leave unchanged.
Returns:

The updated ~easypaperless.models.document_types.DocumentType.

async def delete(self, id: int) -> None: 
183    async def delete(self, id: int) -> None:
184        """Delete a document type.
185
186        Args:
187            id: Numeric ID of the document type to delete.
188
189        Raises:
190            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document type exists with that ID.
191        """
192        logger.info("Deleting document type id=%d", id)
193        await self._core._delete_resource("document_types", id)

Delete a document type.

Arguments:
  • id: Numeric ID of the document type to delete.
Raises:
  • ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document type exists with that ID.
async def bulk_delete(self, ids: List[int]) -> None: 
195    async def bulk_delete(self, ids: List[int]) -> None:
196        """Permanently delete multiple document types in a single request.
197
198        Args:
199            ids: List of document type IDs to delete.
200        """
201        logger.info("Bulk deleting %d document types", len(ids))
202        await self._core._bulk_edit_objects("document_types", ids, "delete")

Permanently delete multiple document types in a single request.

Arguments:
  • ids: List of document type IDs to delete.
async def bulk_set_permissions( self, ids: List[int], *, set_permissions: easypaperless.SetPermissions | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, owner: int | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, merge: bool = False) -> None: 
204    async def bulk_set_permissions(
205        self,
206        ids: List[int],
207        *,
208        set_permissions: SetPermissions | Unset = UNSET,
209        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
210        merge: bool = False,
211    ) -> None:
212        """Set permissions and/or owner on multiple document types.
213
214        Args:
215            ids: List of document type IDs to modify.
216            set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets.
217                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
218            owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner.
219                Pass ``None`` to clear the owner.
220                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
221            merge: When ``True``, new permissions are merged with existing ones.
222        """
223        logger.info("Bulk setting permissions on %d document types", len(ids))
224        params: dict[str, Any] = {"merge": merge}
225        if not isinstance(set_permissions, Unset):
226            params["permissions"] = set_permissions.model_dump()
227        if not isinstance(owner, Unset):
228            params["owner"] = owner
229        await self._core._bulk_edit_objects("document_types", ids, "set_permissions", **params)

Set permissions and/or owner on multiple document types.

Arguments:
  • ids: List of document type IDs to modify.
  • set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets. Omit (or pass ~easypaperless.UNSET) to leave unchanged.
  • owner: Numeric user ID to assign as owner. Pass None to clear the owner. Omit (or pass ~easypaperless.UNSET) to leave unchanged.
  • merge: When True, new permissions are merged with existing ones.
class DocumentsResource: 
175class DocumentsResource:
176    """Accessor for documents: ``client.documents``."""
177
178    def __init__(self, core: _ClientCore) -> None:
179        self._core = core
180        self.notes = NotesResource(core)
181
182    @staticmethod
183    def _format_date_value(value: date | datetime | str) -> str:
184        if isinstance(value, datetime):
185            return value.isoformat()
186        if isinstance(value, date):
187            return value.isoformat()
188        return value
189
190    @staticmethod
191    def _is_datetime(value: date | datetime | str) -> bool:
192        if isinstance(value, datetime):
193            return True
194        if isinstance(value, str):
195            return bool(_DATETIME_STR_RE.match(value))
196        return False
197
198    async def get(self, id: int, *, include_metadata: bool = False) -> Document:
199        """Fetch a single document by its ID.
200
201        Args:
202            id: Numeric paperless-ngx document ID.
203            include_metadata: When ``True``, the extended file-level metadata
204                is fetched concurrently and attached to the document.
205                Default: ``False``.
206
207        Returns:
208            The :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.Document` with the
209            given ID.
210
211        Raises:
212            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists
213                with that ID.
214        """
215        logger.info("Getting document id=%d", id)
216        if include_metadata:
217            doc_resp, meta_resp = await asyncio.gather(
218                self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/"),
219                self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/metadata/"),
220            )
221            data = doc_resp.json()
222            data["metadata"] = meta_resp.json()
223        else:
224            resp = await self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/")
225            data = resp.json()
226        return Document.model_validate(data)
227
228    async def get_metadata(self, id: int) -> DocumentMetadata:
229        """Fetch the extended file-level metadata for a document.
230
231        Args:
232            id: Numeric paperless-ngx document ID.
233
234        Returns:
235            A :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.DocumentMetadata` instance.
236
237        Raises:
238            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists
239                with that ID.
240        """
241        logger.info("Getting metadata for document id=%d", id)
242        resp = await self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/metadata/")
243        return DocumentMetadata.model_validate(resp.json())
244
245    async def list(
246        self,
247        *,
248        search: str | None = None,
249        search_mode: str = "title_or_content",
250        ids: List[int] | None = None,
251        tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
252        any_tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
253        exclude_tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
254        correspondent: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
255        any_correspondent: List[int | str] | None = None,
256        exclude_correspondents: List[int | str] | None = None,
257        document_type: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
258        document_type_name_contains: str | None = None,
259        document_type_name_exact: str | None = None,
260        any_document_type: List[int | str] | None = None,
261        exclude_document_types: List[int | str] | None = None,
262        storage_path: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
263        any_storage_paths: List[int | str] | None = None,
264        exclude_storage_paths: List[int | str] | None = None,
265        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
266        exclude_owners: List[int] | None = None,
267        custom_fields: List[int | str] | None = None,
268        any_custom_fields: List[int | str] | None = None,
269        exclude_custom_fields: List[int | str] | None = None,
270        custom_field_query: List[Any] | None = None,
271        archive_serial_number: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
272        archive_serial_number_from: int | None = None,
273        archive_serial_number_till: int | None = None,
274        created_after: date | str | None = None,
275        created_before: date | str | None = None,
276        added_after: date | datetime | str | None = None,
277        added_from: date | datetime | str | None = None,
278        added_before: date | datetime | str | None = None,
279        added_until: date | datetime | str | None = None,
280        modified_after: date | datetime | str | None = None,
281        modified_from: date | datetime | str | None = None,
282        modified_before: date | datetime | str | None = None,
283        modified_until: date | datetime | str | None = None,
284        checksum: str | None = None,
285        page_size: int = 25,
286        page: int | None = None,
287        ordering: str | None = None,
288        descending: bool = False,
289        max_results: int | None = None,
290        on_page: Callable[[int, int | None], None] | None = None,
291    ) -> PagedResult[Document]:
292        """Return a filtered list of documents.
293
294        All tag, correspondent, document-type, storage-path, and custom-field
295        parameters accept either integer IDs or string names.
296
297        When ``page`` is ``None`` (the default), all pages are fetched
298        automatically and ``next`` / ``previous`` in the returned
299        :class:`~easypaperless.models.paged_result.PagedResult` are always
300        ``None`` — even if ``max_results`` truncates the final result set.
301        ``count`` always reflects the server total, not the truncated length.
302        When ``page`` is set to a specific integer, only that one page is
303        fetched and ``next`` / ``previous`` contain the raw API values.
304
305        Args:
306            search: Search string.  Behaviour depends on ``search_mode``.
307            search_mode: How ``search`` is applied.  One of:
308                ``"title_or_content"`` *(default)*, ``"title"``, ``"query"``,
309                ``"original_filename"``.
310            ids: Return only documents whose ID is in this list.
311            tags: Documents must have **all** of these tags (AND semantics).
312            any_tags: Documents must have **at least one** of these tags.
313            exclude_tags: Documents must have **none** of these tags.
314            correspondent: Filter to documents assigned to this correspondent.
315                Pass ``None`` to return only documents with no correspondent set.
316            any_correspondent: Filter to documents assigned to any of these.
317            exclude_correspondents: Exclude documents assigned to any of these.
318            document_type: Filter to documents of exactly this type.
319                Pass ``None`` to return only documents with no document type set.
320            document_type_name_contains: Case-insensitive substring filter on document type name.
321            document_type_name_exact: Case-insensitive exact match on document type name.
322            any_document_type: Filter to documents whose type is any of these.
323            exclude_document_types: Exclude documents whose type is any of these.
324            storage_path: Filter to documents assigned to this storage path.
325                Pass ``None`` to return only documents with no storage path set.
326            any_storage_paths: Filter to documents assigned to any of these paths.
327            exclude_storage_paths: Exclude documents assigned to any of these paths.
328            owner: Filter to documents owned by this user ID.
329                Pass ``None`` to return only documents with no owner set.
330            exclude_owners: Exclude documents owned by any of these user IDs.
331            custom_fields: Documents must have **all** of these custom fields set.
332            any_custom_fields: Documents must have **at least one** of these fields.
333            exclude_custom_fields: Documents must have **none** of these fields.
334            custom_field_query: Filter documents by custom field values using a nested
335                query structure. See the `paperless-ngx API docs
336                <https://docs.paperless-ngx.com/api/#filtering-by-custom-fields>`_ for
337                the query format.
338            archive_serial_number: Filter by exact archive serial number.
339                Pass ``None`` to return only documents with no ASN set.
340            archive_serial_number_from: Filter by ASN >= this value.
341            archive_serial_number_till: Filter by ASN <= this value.
342            created_after: Only documents created after this date.
343                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"``.
344            created_before: Only documents created before this date.
345                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"``.
346            added_after: Only documents added after this date/time.
347                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` for date precision or
348                ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"`` for datetime precision.
349            added_from: Only documents added on or after this date/time.
350                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
351            added_before: Only documents added before this date/time.
352                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
353            added_until: Only documents added on or before this date/time.
354                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
355            modified_after: Only documents modified after this date/time.
356                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
357            modified_from: Only documents modified on or after this date/time.
358                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
359            modified_before: Only documents modified before this date/time.
360                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
361            modified_until: Only documents modified on or before this date/time.
362                String input must be ISO-8601: ``"YYYY-MM-DD"`` or ``"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"``.
363            checksum: MD5 checksum of the original file (exact match).
364            page_size: Number of results per API page.  Default: ``25``.
365            page: Return only this specific page (1-based).
366            ordering: Field name to sort by.
367            descending: When ``True``, reverses the sort direction.
368            max_results: Stop after collecting this many documents.
369            on_page: Callback invoked after each page fetch.
370
371        Returns:
372            :class:`~easypaperless.models.paged_result.PagedResult` of
373            :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.Document` objects.
374        """
375        logger.info("Listing documents")
376        resolver = self._core._resolver
377        params: dict[str, Any] = {"page_size": page_size}
378
379        if search is not None:
380            api_param = _SEARCH_MODE_MAP.get(search_mode, "search")
381            params[api_param] = search
382
383        if ids is not None:
384            params["id__in"] = ",".join(str(i) for i in ids)
385
386        if tags is not None:
387            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", tags)
388            params["tags__id__all"] = ",".join(str(t) for t in resolved)
389
390        if any_tags is not None:
391            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", any_tags)
392            params["tags__id__in"] = ",".join(str(t) for t in resolved)
393
394        if exclude_tags is not None:
395            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", exclude_tags)
396            params["tags__id__none"] = ",".join(str(t) for t in resolved)
397
398        if any_correspondent is not None:
399            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("correspondents", any_correspondent)
400            params["correspondent__id__in"] = ",".join(str(c) for c in resolved)
401        elif not isinstance(correspondent, Unset):
402            if correspondent is None:
403                params["correspondent__isnull"] = "true"
404            else:
405                resolved_id = await resolver.resolve("correspondents", correspondent)
406                params["correspondent__id__in"] = resolved_id
407
408        if exclude_correspondents is not None:
409            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("correspondents", exclude_correspondents)
410            params["correspondent__id__none"] = ",".join(str(c) for c in resolved)
411
412        if document_type_name_contains is not None:
413            params["document_type__name__icontains"] = document_type_name_contains
414        if document_type_name_exact is not None:
415            params["document_type__name__iexact"] = document_type_name_exact
416
417        if any_document_type is not None:
418            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("document_types", any_document_type)
419            params["document_type__id__in"] = ",".join(str(d) for d in resolved)
420        elif not isinstance(document_type, Unset):
421            if document_type is None:
422                params["document_type__isnull"] = "true"
423            else:
424                resolved_id = await resolver.resolve("document_types", document_type)
425                params["document_type"] = resolved_id
426
427        if exclude_document_types is not None:
428            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("document_types", exclude_document_types)
429            params["document_type__id__none"] = ",".join(str(d) for d in resolved)
430
431        if any_storage_paths is not None:
432            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("storage_paths", any_storage_paths)
433            params["storage_path__id__in"] = ",".join(str(s) for s in resolved)
434        elif not isinstance(storage_path, Unset):
435            if storage_path is None:
436                params["storage_path__isnull"] = "true"
437            else:
438                resolved_id = await resolver.resolve("storage_paths", storage_path)
439                params["storage_path__id__in"] = resolved_id
440
441        if exclude_storage_paths is not None:
442            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("storage_paths", exclude_storage_paths)
443            params["storage_path__id__none"] = ",".join(str(s) for s in resolved)
444
445        if not isinstance(owner, Unset):
446            if owner is None:
447                params["owner__isnull"] = "true"
448            else:
449                params["owner__id__in"] = owner
450
451        if exclude_owners is not None:
452            params["owner__id__none"] = ",".join(str(o) for o in exclude_owners)
453
454        if custom_fields is not None:
455            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("custom_fields", custom_fields)
456            params["custom_fields__id__all"] = ",".join(str(f) for f in resolved)
457
458        if any_custom_fields is not None:
459            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("custom_fields", any_custom_fields)
460            params["custom_fields__id__in"] = ",".join(str(f) for f in resolved)
461
462        if exclude_custom_fields is not None:
463            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("custom_fields", exclude_custom_fields)
464            params["custom_fields__id__none"] = ",".join(str(f) for f in resolved)
465
466        if custom_field_query is not None:
467            params["custom_field_query"] = json.dumps(custom_field_query)
468
469        if not isinstance(archive_serial_number, Unset):
470            if archive_serial_number is None:
471                params["archive_serial_number__isnull"] = "true"
472            else:
473                params["archive_serial_number"] = archive_serial_number
474
475        if archive_serial_number_from is not None:
476            params["archive_serial_number__gte"] = archive_serial_number_from
477
478        if archive_serial_number_till is not None:
479            params["archive_serial_number__lte"] = archive_serial_number_till
480
481        if created_after is not None:
482            params["created__date__gt"] = self._format_date_value(created_after)
483
484        if created_before is not None:
485            params["created__date__lt"] = self._format_date_value(created_before)
486
487        if added_after is not None:
488            key = "added__gt" if self._is_datetime(added_after) else "added__date__gt"
489            params[key] = self._format_date_value(added_after)
490
491        if added_from is not None:
492            key = "added__gte" if self._is_datetime(added_from) else "added__date__gte"
493            params[key] = self._format_date_value(added_from)
494
495        if added_before is not None:
496            key = "added__lt" if self._is_datetime(added_before) else "added__date__lt"
497            params[key] = self._format_date_value(added_before)
498
499        if added_until is not None:
500            key = "added__lte" if self._is_datetime(added_until) else "added__date__lte"
501            params[key] = self._format_date_value(added_until)
502
503        if modified_after is not None:
504            key = "modified__gt" if self._is_datetime(modified_after) else "modified__date__gt"
505            params[key] = self._format_date_value(modified_after)
506
507        if modified_from is not None:
508            key = "modified__gte" if self._is_datetime(modified_from) else "modified__date__gte"
509            params[key] = self._format_date_value(modified_from)
510
511        if modified_before is not None:
512            key = "modified__lt" if self._is_datetime(modified_before) else "modified__date__lt"
513            params[key] = self._format_date_value(modified_before)
514
515        if modified_until is not None:
516            key = "modified__lte" if self._is_datetime(modified_until) else "modified__date__lte"
517            params[key] = self._format_date_value(modified_until)
518
519        if checksum is not None:
520            params["checksum__iexact"] = checksum
521
522        if ordering is not None:
523            params["ordering"] = f"-{ordering}" if descending else ordering
524
525        if page is not None:
526            params["page"] = page
527            raw = await self._core._session.get_page("/documents/", params=params)
528            items = raw.items
529            if max_results is not None:
530                items = items[:max_results]
531            return PagedResult(
532                count=raw.count,
533                next=raw.next,
534                previous=raw.previous,
535                all=raw.all_ids,
536                results=[Document.model_validate(item) for item in items],
537            )
538
539        raw = await self._core._session.get_all_pages_paged(
540            "/documents/", params, max_results=max_results, on_page=on_page
541        )
542        return PagedResult(
543            count=raw.count,
544            next=raw.next,
545            previous=raw.previous,
546            all=raw.all_ids,
547            results=[Document.model_validate(item) for item in raw.items],
548        )
549
550    async def update(
551        self,
552        id: int,
553        *,
554        title: str | Unset = UNSET,
555        content: str | Unset = UNSET,
556        created: date | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
557        correspondent: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
558        document_type: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
559        storage_path: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
560        tags: List[int | str] | None | Unset = UNSET,
561        archive_serial_number: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
562        custom_fields: List[dict[str, Any]] | None | Unset = UNSET,
563        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
564        set_permissions: SetPermissions | None | Unset = UNSET,
565        remove_inbox_tags: bool | None | Unset = UNSET,
566    ) -> Document:
567        """Partially update a document (PATCH semantics).
568
569        Args:
570            id: Numeric ID of the document to update.
571            title: New document title.
572            content: OCR text content of the document.
573            created: Creation date as an ISO-8601 string (``"YYYY-MM-DD"``) or a
574                :class:`~datetime.date` object.
575            correspondent: Correspondent to assign, as an ID or name.
576                Pass ``None`` to clear the correspondent.
577            document_type: Document type to assign, as an ID or name.
578                Pass ``None`` to clear the document type.
579            storage_path: Storage path to assign, as an ID or name.
580                Pass ``None`` to clear the storage path.
581            tags: Full replacement list of tags (IDs or names).
582            archive_serial_number: Archive serial number to assign.
583                Pass ``None`` to clear the archive serial number.
584            custom_fields: List of ``{"field": <field_id>, "value": ...}`` dicts.
585            owner: Numeric user ID to assign as document owner.
586                Pass ``None`` to clear the owner.
587            set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets.
588                Pass ``None`` to clear all permissions (overwrite with empty).
589                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
590            remove_inbox_tags: When ``True``, removes all inbox tags from the document.
591
592        Returns:
593            The updated :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.Document`.
594        """
595        logger.info("Updating document id=%d", id)
596        resolver = self._core._resolver
597        payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
598
599        if not isinstance(title, Unset):
600            payload["title"] = title
601        if not isinstance(content, Unset):
602            payload["content"] = content
603        if not isinstance(created, Unset):
604            payload["created"] = self._format_date_value(created) if created is not None else None
605        if not isinstance(correspondent, Unset):
606            payload["correspondent"] = (
607                None
608                if correspondent is None
609                else await resolver.resolve("correspondents", correspondent)
610            )
611        if not isinstance(document_type, Unset):
612            payload["document_type"] = (
613                None
614                if document_type is None
615                else await resolver.resolve("document_types", document_type)
616            )
617        if not isinstance(storage_path, Unset):
618            payload["storage_path"] = (
619                None
620                if storage_path is None
621                else await resolver.resolve("storage_paths", storage_path)
622            )
623        if not isinstance(tags, Unset):
624            payload["tags"] = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", tags or [])
625        if not isinstance(archive_serial_number, Unset):
626            payload["archive_serial_number"] = archive_serial_number
627        if not isinstance(custom_fields, Unset):
628            payload["custom_fields"] = custom_fields
629        if not isinstance(owner, Unset):
630            payload["owner"] = owner
631        if not isinstance(set_permissions, Unset):
632            payload["set_permissions"] = (
633                SetPermissions().model_dump()
634                if set_permissions is None
635                else set_permissions.model_dump()
636            )
637        if not isinstance(remove_inbox_tags, Unset):
638            payload["remove_inbox_tags"] = remove_inbox_tags
639
640        resp = await self._core._session.patch(f"/documents/{id}/", json=payload)
641        return Document.model_validate(resp.json())
642
643    async def delete(self, id: int) -> None:
644        """Permanently delete a document.
645
646        Args:
647            id: Numeric ID of the document to delete.
648
649        Raises:
650            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists
651                with that ID.
652        """
653        logger.info("Deleting document id=%d", id)
654        await self._core._session.delete(f"/documents/{id}/")
655
656    async def download(self, id: int, *, original: bool = False) -> bytes:
657        """Download the binary content of a document.
658
659        Args:
660            id: Numeric ID of the document to download.
661            original: If ``False`` *(default)*, returns the archived PDF.
662                If ``True``, returns the original uploaded file.
663
664        Returns:
665            Raw file bytes.
666        """
667        logger.info("Downloading document id=%d (original=%s)", id, original)
668        endpoint = "download" if original else "archive"
669        resp = await self._core._session.get_download(f"/documents/{id}/{endpoint}/")
670        content_type = resp.headers.get("content-type", "")
671        if "text/html" in content_type or resp.content[:9].lower().startswith(b"<!doctype"):
672            raise ServerError(
673                f"Download returned an HTML page (content-type: {content_type!r}). "
674                "The server redirected to a login page even after re-attaching auth.",
675                status_code=None,
676            )
677        return resp.content
678
679    async def upload(
680        self,
681        file: str | Path,
682        *,
683        title: str | Unset = UNSET,
684        created: date | str | None = None,
685        correspondent: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
686        document_type: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
687        storage_path: int | str | None | Unset = UNSET,
688        tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
689        archive_serial_number: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
690        custom_fields: List[dict[str, Any]] | None = None,
691        wait: bool = False,
692        poll_interval: float | None = None,
693        poll_timeout: float | None = None,
694    ) -> str | Document:
695        """Upload a document to paperless-ngx.
696
697        Args:
698            file: Path to the file to upload.
699            title: Title to assign to the document.
700            created: Creation date as an ISO-8601 string (``"YYYY-MM-DD"``) or a
701                :class:`~datetime.date` object.
702            correspondent: Correspondent to assign, as an ID or name.
703            document_type: Document type to assign, as an ID or name.
704            storage_path: Storage path to assign, as an ID or name.
705            tags: Tags to assign, as IDs or names.
706            archive_serial_number: Archive serial number to assign.
707            custom_fields: List of ``{"field": <field_id>, "value": ...}`` dicts.
708            wait: If ``False`` *(default)*, returns immediately with the task ID.
709                If ``True``, polls until processing completes.
710            poll_interval: Seconds between task-status checks while waiting for
711                processing to complete (requires ``wait=True``). Overrides the
712                client-level default. When omitted, falls back to the client-level
713                ``poll_interval`` (``2.0`` s unless changed at construction).
714            poll_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait before raising
715                :exc:`~easypaperless.exceptions.TaskTimeoutError` (requires
716                ``wait=True``). Overrides the client-level default. When omitted,
717                falls back to the client-level ``poll_timeout`` (``60.0`` s unless
718                changed at construction).
719
720        Returns:
721            The Celery task ID string when ``wait=False``, or the fully
722            processed :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.Document`
723            when ``wait=True``.
724
725        Raises:
726            ~easypaperless.exceptions.UploadError: If processing fails.
727            ~easypaperless.exceptions.TaskTimeoutError: If timeout is exceeded.
728        """
729        resolver = self._core._resolver
730        file_path = Path(file)
731        file_bytes = file_path.read_bytes()
732        logger.info("Uploading %r (%d bytes)", file_path.name, len(file_bytes))
733
734        data: dict[str, Any] = {}
735        if not isinstance(title, Unset):
736            data["title"] = title
737        if created is not None:
738            data["created"] = self._format_date_value(created)
739        if not isinstance(correspondent, Unset) and correspondent is not None:
740            data["correspondent"] = await resolver.resolve("correspondents", correspondent)
741        if not isinstance(document_type, Unset) and document_type is not None:
742            data["document_type"] = await resolver.resolve("document_types", document_type)
743        if not isinstance(storage_path, Unset) and storage_path is not None:
744            data["storage_path"] = await resolver.resolve("storage_paths", storage_path)
745        if tags is not None:
746            resolved = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", tags)
747            data["tags"] = resolved
748        if not isinstance(archive_serial_number, Unset) and archive_serial_number is not None:
749            data["archive_serial_number"] = archive_serial_number
750        if custom_fields is not None:
751            data["custom_fields"] = json.dumps(custom_fields)
752
753        files = {"document": (file_path.name, file_bytes)}
754        resp = await self._core._session.post("/documents/post_document/", data=data, files=files)
755        task_id: str = resp.text.strip('"')
756        logger.debug("Upload accepted, task_id=%r", task_id)
757
758        if not wait:
759            return task_id
760
761        interval = poll_interval if poll_interval is not None else self._core._poll_interval
762        timeout = poll_timeout if poll_timeout is not None else self._core._poll_timeout
763        return await self._poll_task(task_id, poll_interval=interval, poll_timeout=timeout)
764
765    async def _poll_task(
766        self, task_id: str, *, poll_interval: float, poll_timeout: float
767    ) -> Document:
768        start = time.monotonic()
769        deadline = start + poll_timeout
770        while time.monotonic() < deadline:
771            resp = await self._core._session.get("/tasks/", params={"task_id": task_id})
772            tasks = resp.json()
773            if not tasks:
774                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
775                continue
776
777            task = Task.model_validate(tasks[0])
778            elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
779            logger.debug(
780                "Polling task %r (status=%s, elapsed=%.1fs)",
781                task_id,
782                task.status.value if task.status is not None else "unknown",
783                elapsed,
784            )
785            if task.status == TaskStatus.SUCCESS:
786                if task.related_document is None:
787                    raise UploadError(f"Task {task_id!r} succeeded but returned no document ID")
788                doc_id = int(task.related_document)
789                logger.info("Task %r succeeded, document_id=%d", task_id, doc_id)
790                return await self.get(doc_id)
791            elif task.status == TaskStatus.FAILURE:
792                logger.warning("Task %r failed: %s", task_id, task.result)
793                raise UploadError(f"Document processing failed: {task.result}")
794            elif task.status == TaskStatus.REVOKED:
795                logger.warning("Task %r was revoked", task_id)
796                raise UploadError(f"Task {task_id!r} was revoked")
797            await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
798
799        elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
800        logger.warning("Task %r timed out after %.1fs", task_id, elapsed)
801        raise TaskTimeoutError(f"Task {task_id!r} did not complete within {poll_timeout}s")
802
803    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
804    # Document bulk operations
805    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
806
807    async def _bulk_edit(self, document_ids: List[int], method: str, **parameters: Any) -> None:
808        """Execute a bulk-edit operation on a list of documents.
809
810        Args:
811            document_ids: List of document IDs to operate on.
812            method: Bulk-edit method name (e.g. ``"add_tag"``, ``"delete"``).
813            **parameters: Additional keyword arguments forwarded to the API.
814        """
815        payload = {"documents": document_ids, "method": method, "parameters": parameters}
816        await self._core._session.post("/documents/bulk_edit/", json=payload, timeout=120.0)
817
818    async def bulk_add_tag(self, document_ids: List[int], tag: int | str) -> None:
819        """Add a tag to multiple documents in a single request.
820
821        Args:
822            document_ids: List of document IDs to tag.
823            tag: Tag to add, as an ID or name.
824        """
825        logger.info("Bulk adding tag %r to %d documents", tag, len(document_ids))
826        tag_id = await self._core._resolver.resolve("tags", tag)
827        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "add_tag", tag=tag_id)
828
829    async def bulk_remove_tag(self, document_ids: List[int], tag: int | str) -> None:
830        """Remove a tag from multiple documents in a single request.
831
832        Args:
833            document_ids: List of document IDs to un-tag.
834            tag: Tag to remove, as an ID or name.
835        """
836        logger.info("Bulk removing tag %r from %d documents", tag, len(document_ids))
837        tag_id = await self._core._resolver.resolve("tags", tag)
838        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "remove_tag", tag=tag_id)
839
840    async def bulk_modify_tags(
841        self,
842        document_ids: List[int],
843        *,
844        add_tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
845        remove_tags: List[int | str] | None = None,
846    ) -> None:
847        """Add and/or remove tags on multiple documents atomically.
848
849        Args:
850            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
851            add_tags: Tags to add, as IDs or names.
852            remove_tags: Tags to remove, as IDs or names.
853        """
854        logger.info("Bulk modifying tags on %d documents", len(document_ids))
855        resolver = self._core._resolver
856        add_ids = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", add_tags or [])
857        remove_ids = await resolver.resolve_list("tags", remove_tags or [])
858        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "modify_tags", add_tags=add_ids, remove_tags=remove_ids)
859
860    async def bulk_delete(self, document_ids: List[int]) -> None:
861        """Permanently delete multiple documents in a single request.
862
863        Args:
864            document_ids: List of document IDs to delete.
865        """
866        logger.info("Bulk deleting %d documents", len(document_ids))
867        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "delete")
868
869    async def bulk_set_correspondent(
870        self, document_ids: List[int], correspondent: int | str | None
871    ) -> None:
872        """Assign a correspondent to multiple documents in a single request.
873
874        Args:
875            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
876            correspondent: Correspondent to assign, as an ID or name.
877                Pass ``None`` to clear.
878        """
879        logger.info(
880            "Bulk setting correspondent %r on %d documents", correspondent, len(document_ids)
881        )
882        cor_id: int | None = None
883        if correspondent is not None:
884            cor_id = await self._core._resolver.resolve("correspondents", correspondent)
885        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "set_correspondent", correspondent=cor_id)
886
887    async def bulk_set_document_type(
888        self, document_ids: List[int], document_type: int | str | None
889    ) -> None:
890        """Assign a document type to multiple documents in a single request.
891
892        Args:
893            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
894            document_type: Document type to assign, as an ID or name.
895                Pass ``None`` to clear.
896        """
897        logger.info(
898            "Bulk setting document type %r on %d documents", document_type, len(document_ids)
899        )
900        dt_id: int | None = None
901        if document_type is not None:
902            dt_id = await self._core._resolver.resolve("document_types", document_type)
903        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "set_document_type", document_type=dt_id)
904
905    async def bulk_set_storage_path(
906        self, document_ids: List[int], storage_path: int | str | None
907    ) -> None:
908        """Assign a storage path to multiple documents in a single request.
909
910        Args:
911            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
912            storage_path: Storage path to assign, as an ID or name.
913                Pass ``None`` to clear.
914        """
915        logger.info("Bulk setting storage path %r on %d documents", storage_path, len(document_ids))
916        sp_id: int | None = None
917        if storage_path is not None:
918            sp_id = await self._core._resolver.resolve("storage_paths", storage_path)
919        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "set_storage_path", storage_path=sp_id)
920
921    async def bulk_modify_custom_fields(
922        self,
923        document_ids: List[int],
924        *,
925        add_fields: List[dict[str, Any]] | None = None,
926        remove_fields: List[int] | None = None,
927    ) -> None:
928        """Add and/or remove custom field values on multiple documents.
929
930        Args:
931            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
932            add_fields: Custom-field value dicts to add.
933            remove_fields: Custom-field IDs whose values should be removed.
934        """
935        logger.info("Bulk modifying custom fields on %d documents", len(document_ids))
936        await self._bulk_edit(
937            document_ids,
938            "modify_custom_fields",
939            add_custom_fields=add_fields or [],
940            remove_custom_fields=remove_fields or [],
941        )
942
943    async def bulk_set_permissions(
944        self,
945        document_ids: List[int],
946        *,
947        set_permissions: SetPermissions | Unset = UNSET,
948        owner: int | None | Unset = UNSET,
949        merge: bool = False,
950    ) -> None:
951        """Set permissions and/or owner on multiple documents.
952
953        Args:
954            document_ids: List of document IDs to modify.
955            set_permissions: Explicit view/change permission sets.
956                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
957            owner: Numeric user ID to assign as document owner.
958                Pass ``None`` to clear the owner.
959                Omit (or pass :data:`~easypaperless.UNSET`) to leave unchanged.
960            merge: When ``True``, new permissions are merged with existing ones.
961        """
962        logger.info("Bulk setting permissions on %d documents", len(document_ids))
963        params: dict[str, Any] = {"merge": merge}
964        if not isinstance(set_permissions, Unset):
965            params["set_permissions"] = set_permissions.model_dump()
966        if not isinstance(owner, Unset):
967            params["owner"] = owner
968        await self._bulk_edit(document_ids, "set_permissions", **params)

Accessor for documents: client.documents.

DocumentsResource(core: easypaperless.client._ClientCore) 
178    def __init__(self, core: _ClientCore) -> None:
179        self._core = core
180        self.notes = NotesResource(core)
notes
async def get( self, id: int, *, include_metadata: bool = False) -> easypaperless.Document: 
198    async def get(self, id: int, *, include_metadata: bool = False) -> Document:
199        """Fetch a single document by its ID.
200
201        Args:
202            id: Numeric paperless-ngx document ID.
203            include_metadata: When ``True``, the extended file-level metadata
204                is fetched concurrently and attached to the document.
205                Default: ``False``.
206
207        Returns:
208            The :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.Document` with the
209            given ID.
210
211        Raises:
212            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists
213                with that ID.
214        """
215        logger.info("Getting document id=%d", id)
216        if include_metadata:
217            doc_resp, meta_resp = await asyncio.gather(
218                self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/"),
219                self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/metadata/"),
220            )
221            data = doc_resp.json()
222            data["metadata"] = meta_resp.json()
223        else:
224            resp = await self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/")
225            data = resp.json()
226        return Document.model_validate(data)

Fetch a single document by its ID.

Arguments:
  • id: Numeric paperless-ngx document ID.
  • include_metadata: When True, the extended file-level metadata is fetched concurrently and attached to the document. Default: False.
Returns:

The ~easypaperless.models.documents.Document with the given ID.

Raises:
  • ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists with that ID.
async def get_metadata(self, id: int) -> easypaperless.DocumentMetadata: 
228    async def get_metadata(self, id: int) -> DocumentMetadata:
229        """Fetch the extended file-level metadata for a document.
230
231        Args:
232            id: Numeric paperless-ngx document ID.
233
234        Returns:
235            A :class:`~easypaperless.models.documents.DocumentMetadata` instance.
236
237        Raises:
238            ~easypaperless.exceptions.NotFoundError: If no document exists
239                with that ID.
240        """
241        logger.info("Getting metadata for document id=%d", id)
242        resp = await self._core._session.get(f"/documents/{id}/metadata/")
243        return DocumentMetadata.model_validate(resp.json())

Fetch the extended file-level metadata for a document.

Arguments:

Returns:

A ~easypaperless.models.documents.DocumentMetadata instance.

Raises:

Optional[List[Union[str, int]]] = None, exclude_tags: Optional[List[Union[str, int]]] = None, correspondent: int | str | None | easypaperless.Unset = UNSET, any_correspondent: Optional[List[Union[str,
